key_theorem.statement: de Sitter EML-1 Universality: The scale factor a(t)=exp(Ht) places de Sitter expansion in the EML-1 universality class, alongside: Boltzmann factor exp(-E/kT) [stat mech], max-entropy distribution exp(θ·T(x)) [info theory], path integral amplitude exp(-S) [QFT], Hawking-Boltzmann factor exp(-E/T_H) [black holes]. All are EML-1 atoms — the universe's equilibrium/ground-state structures are EML-1.
key_theorem.significance: de Sitter expansion a(t)=exp(Ht) is EML-1. This places the universe's accelerated expansion in the SAME EML class as Boltzmann weights (stat mech), exponential family distributions (info theory), path integral amplitudes (QFT), and coherent state amplitudes (quantum optics). EML-1 = the universality class of equilibrium and ground-state structures.

de_sitter_space.eml_universality: de Sitter EML-1 Universality: The scale factor a(t)=exp(Ht) places de Sitter expansion in the EML-1 universality class, alongside: Boltzmann factor exp(-E/kT) [stat mech], max-entropy distribution exp(θ·T(x)) [info theory], path integral amplitude exp(-S) [QFT], Hawking-Boltzmann factor exp(-E/T_H) [black holes]. All are EML-1 atoms — the universe's equilibrium/ground-state structures are EML-1.
de_sitter_space.eml_Ricci: EML-2: R_μν = Λ·g_μν = EML-2 (Λ = EML-0 constant × metric EML-3 in θ, EML-1 in t)

ads_cft.ads_cft_eml_statement: AdS/CFT preserves EML-2: bulk propagator is EML-2, boundary CFT correlator is EML-2. The holographic duality maps EML-2 on both sides.

penrose_singularity.statement: If energy conditions hold and trapped surface exists → singularity inevitable. EML: singularity = EML-∞ curvature.

gr_eml_depth_table.reason: Σ = r²+a²cos²θ (cos² = EML-3) in denominator → EML-3

eml_depth_summary.EML-1: de Sitter scale factor a(t)=exp(Ht); Hawking-Boltzmann exp(-E/T_H)
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Schwarzschild metric, Hawking T_H, Bekenstein entropy, Kerr Δ, Hubble H, AdS propagator, Kolmogorov scales
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: Kerr g_tt (via cos²θ), GW strain, ergosphere radius, spacetime line element with angular terms
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Schwarzschild r=0, Kerr ring singularity, Penrose singularity, Big Bang/Big Crunch

connections.to_session_63: Session 63: Schwarzschild + Hawking. Session 77: Kerr + de Sitter + AdS/CFT + Penrose
connections.to_session_57: de Sitter EML-1 = Boltzmann EML-1 (same universality class, same theorem)
connections.to_session_60: de Sitter EML-1 = max-entropy EML-1 (info theory); GR and info theory share EML-1 ground state
connections.to_session_61: Path integral amplitude EML-1 = de Sitter EML-1; QFT and GR unified at EML-1
